episodes.title: When Politics Turn Into Control | Secular Cults Explained
episodes.description:
When people hear the word cult, they often think of religion, but cults can be built on ideas, politics, or movements where beliefs become controlling. In this video we delve into the underlying factors and dark history that contribute to the swift formation of political cults, exploring the psychological, social, and economic elements that make certain groups susceptible to charismatic leaders and ideologies.

episodes.title: Modern Cults Unmasked: Algorithms & Dangerous Influencers
episodes.description:
In this video, we explore the fascinating aspects of the human mind and the psychology behind extreme leadership. We take a look at the concept of dictatorship, like the totalitarianism seen in North Korea. Then we deep dive into the modern version of personality cults ... influencers and content creators by examining Teal Swan in new age spiritualism & Andrew Tate in the manosphere 💡

This is part two of an ongoing series exploring all the different types of cults!  by looking at influencers such as Teal Swan and Andrew Tate.

*NOTE: This video contains mature topics due to the discussion around Teal Swan and Andrew Tate

Tate Lawsuit Fundraiser: https://www.crowdjustice.com/case/hold-andrew-tate-accountable/
Me Too Movement: https://metoomvmt.org/
Red Pill Recovery Support: https://www.reddit.com/r/exredpill/

References: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1dcbdg_lQXswJ7M7FZa921q83dQ6RpM08kyz2W8eG3vo/edit?usp=sharing
